zh_Hans:
[center][wave]创建或打开一个[color=orange]对话[/color]来开始！
[center]\( ^-^)/

keys: Toggle the visibility of hidden files.
en: Toggle the visibility of hidden files.
zh_Hans: 切换隐藏文件的可见性。

keys: View items as a grid of thumbnails.
en: View items as a grid of thumbnails.
zh_Hans: 以栅格缩略图的形式查看项目。
以列表的形式查看项目。

keys: Toggle the visibility of the filter for file names.
en: Toggle the visibility of the filter for file names.
zh_Hans: 显示/隐藏文件名过滤器。
按修改时间排序（最新优先）
按修改时间排序（最早优先）
收藏/取消收藏当前文件夹。
复制选中的节点（到剪切板）

keys: Run a preview of the dialog
en: Run a preview of the dialog

keys: Makes the selected text use bold font.
en: Makes the selected text use bold font.

keys: Makes the selected text use italic font.
en: Makes the selected text use italic font.

zh_Hans: 使所选文本使用下划线。
使所选文本使用删除线。

keys: Change the font of the selected text.
en: Change the font of the selected text.

keys: Add outline to the selected text.
en: Add outline to the selected text.

keys: Change the color of the selected text.
en: Change the color of the selected text.

keys: Change the background color of the selected text.
en: Change the background color of the selected text.
zh_Hans: 更改所选文本的背景颜色。

keys: Horizontally align the selected text to left.
en: Horizontally align the selected text to left.
zh_Hans: 将所选文本水平对齐到左边。

keys: Horizontally align the selected text to center.
en: Horizontally align the selected text to center.
zh_Hans: 将所选文本水平对齐到中间。

keys: Horizontally align the selected text to right.
en: Horizontally align the selected text to right.
zh_Hans: 将所选文本水平对齐到右边。

keys: Insert a hyperlink in the selected text.
en: Insert a hyperlink in the selected text.
zh_Hans: 在所选文本中插入超链接。

keys: Add an effect to the selected text.
en: Add an effect to the selected text.
zh_Hans: 在所选文本中添加效果。

keys: Add a special tag to the selected text.
en: Add a special tag to the selected text.
zh_Hans: 在所选文本中添加一个特殊标签。

keys: Extra spacing for the space character.
en: Extra spacing for the space character.

keys: Extra spacing at the top of the line.
en: Exrra spacing at the top of the line.

keys: Extra spacing at the bottom of the line.
en: Extra spacing at the bottom of the line.

keys: Custom bold and italic font style.
en: Custom bold and italic font style.
zh_Hans: 自定义粗体和斜体字体样式。

keys: Font embolden strength, if it is not equal to zero, emboldens the font outlines. Negative values reduce the outline thickness.
en: Font embolden strength, if it is not equal to zero, emboldens the font outlines. Negative values reduce the outline thickness.
zh_Hans: 字体加粗强度，若不为零，则对字体轮廓进行加粗。负值可减细轮廓。

keys: Font slant strength, positive values slant glyphs to the right. Negative values to the left.
en: Font slant strength, positive values slant glyphs to the right. Negative values to the left.
zh_Hans: 字体倾斜强度，正值使字形向右倾斜，负值向左倾斜。

keys: Region rect of the image. This can be used to display a single image from a spritesheet.
en: Region rect of the image. This can be used to display a single image from a spritesheet.
zh_Hans: 图像的矩形裁剪区域。可用于从精灵表中显示单个图像。

keys: Target width of the image. If is provided, the image will try to fit that width maintaining the aspect ratio.
en: Target width of the image. If is provided, the image will try to fit that width maintaining the aspect ratio.
zh_Hans: 图像目标宽度。若指定该值，图像将在保持宽高比的前提下适应此宽度。

keys: Target height of the image. If both width and height are provided, the image will be scaled to that size.
en: Target height of the image. If both width and height are provided, the image will be scaled to that size.
zh_Hans: 图像目标高度。若同时指定宽度和高度，图像将缩放至该尺寸。

keys: If set to true, and the image is smaller than the size specified by width and height, the image padding is added to match the size instead of upscaling.
en: If set to true, and the image is smaller than the size specified by width and height, the image padding is added to match the size instead of upscaling.
zh_Hans: 若启用此选项，当图像小于指定的宽度和高度时，将添加内边距以匹配尺寸，而非进行放大。

keys: X coordinate where the image region begins.
en: X coordinate where the image region begins.
zh_Hans: 图像裁剪区域的起始 X 坐标。

keys: Y coordinate where the image region begins.
en: Y coordinate where the image region begins.
zh_Hans: 图像裁剪区域的起始 Y 坐标。

keys: Add a hyperlink. By default, meta tags do nothing when clicked. Must be handled with the "meta_clicked" signal in the DialogBox to have an effect
en: Add a hyperlink. By default, meta tags do nothing when clicked. Must be handled with the ""meta_clicked" signal in the DialogBox to have an effect
zh_Hans: 添加超链接。默认情况下，点击 meta 标签不会产生任何效果，需通过 DialogBox 的 "meta_clicked" 信号进行处理才能实现交互功能。

keys: Pulse creates an animated pulsing effect that multiplies each character's opacity and color.
en: Pulse creates an animated pulsing effect that multiplies each character's opacity and color.
zh_Hans: 脉冲效果会生成一个动态的脉动动画，改变每个字符的不透明度和颜色。

keys: Frequency of the half-pulsing cycle (higher is faster). A full pulsing cycle takes 2 * (1.0 / freq) seconds.
en: Frequency of the half-pulsing cycle (higher is faster). A full pulsing cycle takes 2 * (1.0 / freq) seconds.
zh_Hans: 半脉冲周期的频率（数值越高速度越快）。一个完整脉冲周期需要 2 * (1.0 / 频率) 秒。

keys: Ease is the easing function exponent to use. Negative values provide in-out easing, which is why the default is -2.0.
en: Ease is the easing function exponent to use. Negative values provide in-out easing, which is why the default is -2.0.
zh_Hans: 缓动指数，用于控制动画曲线。负值产生先加速后减速的缓动效果，因此默认值为 -2.0。

keys: Color is the target color multiplier for blinking. The default mostly fades out text, but not entirely.
en: Color is the target color multiplier for blinking. The default mostly fades out text, but not entirely.
zh_Hans: 颜色是闪烁效果的目标颜色乘数。默认设置通常会让文本淡出，但不会完全消失。

keys: Wave makes the text go up and down.
en: Wave makes the text go up and down.
zh_Hans: 波浪效果让文本上下浮动。

keys: Amplitude controls how high and low the effect goes.
en: Amplitude controls how high and low the effect goes.
zh_Hans: 振幅控制波浪效果的高低幅度。

keys: If connected is 1 (default), glyphs with ligatures will be moved together. If connected is 0, each glyph is moved individually even if they are joined by ligatures. This can work around certain rendering issues with font ligatures.
en: If connected is 1 (default), glyphs with ligatures will be moved together. If connected is 0, each glyph is moved individually even if they are joined by ligatures. This can work around certain rendering issues with font ligatures.
zh_Hans: 若连接值设为 1（默认值），具有连字的字形将整体移动。若设为 0，即使存在连字，每个字形也会单独移动。这可以解决某些字体连字的渲染问题。

keys: Tornado makes the text move around in a circle.
en: Tornado makes the text move around in a circle.
zh_Hans: 龙卷风效果让文本围绕圆心旋转。

keys: Radius is the radius of the circle that controls the offset.
en: Radius is the radius of the circle that controls the offset.
zh_Hans: 半径控制文本偏移的圆周大小。

keys: Frequency is how fast the text moves in a circle. A frequency value of 0 will pause the animation, while negative frequency will play the animation backwards.
en: Frequency is how fast the text moves in a circle. A frequency value of 0 will pause the animation, while negative frequency will play the animation backwards.
zh_Hans: 频率控制文本旋转的速度。频率为 0 时动画暂停，负值则使动画反向播放。
震动效果让文本产生震动。

keys: Rate controls how fast the text shakes.
en: Rate controls how fast the text shakes.
zh_Hans: 速率控制文本震动的快慢。

keys: Level controls how far the text is offset from the origin.
en: Level controls how far the text is offset from the origin.
zh_Hans: 强度控制文本偏离原点的距离。

keys: If connected is 0, each glyph is moved individually even if they are joined by ligatures. This can work around certain rendering issues with font ligatures.
en: If connected is 0, each glyph is moved individually even if they are joined by ligatures. This can work around certain rendering issues with font ligatures.
zh_Hans: 若连接值设为 0，即使存在连字，每个字形也会单独移动。这可以解决某些字体连字的渲染问题。

keys: Fade creates a static fade effect that multiplies each character's opacity.
en: Fade creates a static fade effect that multiplies each character's opacity.
zh_Hans: 淡入淡出效果会生成一个静态的淡变效果，改变每个字符的不透明度。

keys: Start controls the starting position of the falloff relative to where the fade command is inserted.
en: Start controls the starting position of the falloff relative to where the fade command is inserted.
zh_Hans: 起始位置控制衰减效果的起点，相对于插入淡变命令的位置。

keys: Length controls over how many characters should the fade out take place.
en: Length controls over how many characters should the fade out take place.
zh_Hans: 长度控制淡出效果覆盖的字符数量。

keys: Rainbow gives the text a rainbow color that changes over time.
en: Rainbow gives the text a rainbow color that changes over time.
zh_Hans: 彩虹效果让文本呈现随时间变化的彩虹色。

keys: Frequency determines how many letters the rainbow extends over before it repeats itself.
en: Frequency determines how many letters the rainbow extends over before it repeats itself.
zh_Hans: 频率决定彩虹色在多少个字符上循环一次。

keys: Speed is the number of full rainbow cycles per second. A positive speed value will play the animation forwards, a value of 0 will pause the animation, and a negative speed value will play the animation backwards.
en: Speed is the number of full rainbow cycles per second. A positive speed value will play the animation forwards, a value of 0 will pause the animation, and a negative speed value will play the animation backwards.
zh_Hans: 速度是每秒完成的彩虹循环次数。正速度值使动画正向播放，速度值为 0 时动画暂停，负速度值使动画反向播放。

keys: Add a typing speed effect in the selected text.
en: Add a typing speed effect in the selected text.
zh_Hans: 为所选文本添加打字速度效果。

keys:
Absolute speed: The time (in seconds) taken to display each character. A larger value results in a longer interval between characters, making the typing speed slower.
Relative speed: A multiplier relative to the default typing speed configured in the settings (e.g., 2x means twice the default speed). A larger value makes the typing faster (shorter character intervals).
en:
Absolute speed: The time (in seconds) taken to display each character. A larger value results in a longer interval between characters, making the typing speed slower.
Relative speed: A multiplier relative to the default typing speed configured in the settings (e.g., 2x means twice the default speed). A larger value makes the typing faster (shorter character intervals).
zh_Hans:
绝对速度：显示每个字符所用的时间（秒）。值越大，字符之间的间隔越长，打字速度越慢。
相对速度：相对于设置中配置的默认打字速度的倍数（例如，2x表示默认速度的两倍）。值越大，打字速度越快（字符间隔越短）。

keys: Wait: Inserts a fixed pause (in seconds) between characters; the typewriter pauses before continuing with the subsequent content.
en: Wait: Inserts a fixed pause (in seconds) between characters; the typewriter pauses before continuing with the subsequent content.
zh_Hans: 等待：在字符之间插入固定的停顿（以秒为单位）；打字机在继续下一个内容之前停顿了一下。

keys: Add an if condition in the selected text. Displays the text only if a condition is met.
en: Add an if condition in the selected text. Displays the text only if a condition is met.
zh_Hans: 为所选文本添加 if 条件。仅在满足条件时显示文本。

keys: Add a repeat tag in the selected text. Repeats the content inside the tag a specified number of times.
en: Add a repeat tag in the selected text. Repeats the content inside the tag a specified number of times.
zh_Hans: 为所选文本添加 repeat 标签。将标签内的内容重复指定次数。

keys:
The file/s contains unsaved changes. 
Are you sure you want to close this file/s?
en:
The file/s contains unsaved changes. 
Are you sure you want to close this file/s?
zh_Hans:
文件包含未保存的更改。
确定要关闭这些文件吗？

[center][wave]创建或打开一个[color=orange]角色[/color]来开始！
[center]\( ^-^)/

keys: The character key name to reference it is the filename.
en: The character key name to reference it is the filename.
zh_Hans: 角色的引用键名为文件名

keys: The name that will be displayed for this character.
en: The name that will be displayed for this character.
zh_Hans: 此角色在游戏中的显示名称。

keys: It does nothing. It is for your reference only.
en: It does nothing. It is for your reference only.

keys:
Scene with the dialog box where the text will be displayed.
The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogBox class.
en:
Scene with the dialog box where the text will be displayed.
The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogBox class.
zh_Hans:
显示文本的对话框的场景。
场景的根节点必须是继承自DialogBox类的节点。

keys:
Select this option to display the portrait inside the dialog box. 
You need to assign a node in 'Dialog Box Components > Portrait Display'
property from the DialogBox to use it as a parent to display the portrait.
en:
Select this option to display the portrait inside the dialog box.
You need to assign a node in 'Dialog Box Components > Portrait Display' property from the DialogBox to use it as a parent to display the portrait.
zh_Hans:
选择此选项将在对话框内显示头像。
你需要在DialogBox的“Dialog Box Components > Portrait Display”属性中分配一个节点，作为显示头像的父节点。

keys: Default portrait to be used for the character when no portrait is selected.
en: Default portrait to be used for the character when no portrait is selected.
zh_Hans: 当未选择头像时，角色使用的默认头像。

keys:
Transform settings for all portraits.
You can override this for each portrait.
en:
Transform settings for all portraits.
You can override this for each portrait.
zh_Hans:
所有头像的 Transform 设置。
你可以针对单个头像覆盖此设置。

keys:
Ignore transform settings for all portraits
and apply only the transform settings of this portrait.
en:
Ignore transform settings for all portraits
and apply only the transform settings of this portrait.
zh_Hans:
忽略基础 Transform 设置
仅应用此头像的 Transform 设置。

keys:
Are you sure you want to remove this group? 
All variables and groups inside will be removed.
en:
Are you sure you want to remove this group? 
All variables and groups inside will be removed.
zh_Hans:
确定要移除此组吗？
组内的所有变量和子组都将被删除。
自定义事件节点文件夹

_notes: Editor -> Settings Panel -> General Panel -> Custom Event Nodes Folder
Editor -> Settings Panel -> General Panel -> Custom Event Interpreter

keys: The input action that allows the dialog to continue.
en: The input action that allows the dialog to continue.
zh_Hans: 允许对话继续的输入操作。

keys:
Default dialog box that will be displayed when no character is selected.
It will also be used as a template when creating a new dialog box for a character.

The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogBox class.
en:
Default dialog box that will be displayed when no character is selected.
It will also be used as a template when creating a new dialog box for a character.

The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogBox class.
zh_Hans:
当未选择角色时显示的默认对话框。
它也将作为创建角色新对话框的模板。

场景的根节点必须是继承自DialogBox类的节点。

keys: [color=tomato]Please select a valid scene file for the default portrait scene.
en: [color=tomato]Please select a valid scene file for the default portrait scene.
zh_Hans: [color=tomato]请选择一个有效的场景文件作为默认头像场景。

keys:
Default portrait scene that will be used as a template when creating a new portrait for a character.

The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogPortrait class.
en:
Default portrait scene that will be used as a template when creating a new portrait for a character.

The root of the scene must be a node inherited from the DialogPortrait class.
zh_Hans:
创建角色头像时使用的默认头像场景模板。

场景的根节点必须是继承自DialogPortrait类的节点。

keys:
Layer index for the draw order of the canvas layer where dialog boxes will be displayed by default, 
if the dialog box parent is not overriden.
en:
Layer index for the draw order of the canvas layer where dialog boxes will be displayed by default, 
if the dialog box parent is not overriden.
zh_Hans:
默认对话框画布层的绘制顺序索引，
当未覆盖对话框父节点时生效。

keys:
Layer index for the draw order of the canvas layer where portraits will be displayed by default, 
if the portrait parent is not overriden.
en:
Layer index for the draw order of the canvas layer where portraits will be displayed by default, 
if the portrait parent is not overriden.
zh_Hans:
默认头像画布层的绘制顺序索引，
当未覆盖头像父节点时生效。

keys: Enable/disable the use of custom event nodes.
en: Enable/disable the use of custom event nodes.
zh_Hans: 启用/禁用自定义事件节点的使用。

keys: Path to the directory where you have your custom event nodes (.tscn files).
en: Path to the directory where you have your custom event nodes (.tscn files).
zh_Hans: 自定义事件节点（.tscn 文件）所在的目录路径。

keys: [color=tomato]Please select a valid directory for the custom event nodes.
en: [color=tomato]Please select a valid directory for the custom event nodes.
zh_Hans: [color=tomato]请选择一个有效的目录来存放自定义事件节点。

keys: [color=tomato]Please select a valid script (.gd) that extends the SproutyDialogsEventInterpreter class.
en: [color=tomato]Please select a valid script (.gd) that extends the SproutyDialogsEventInterpreter class.

keys:
Path to the custom event interpreter script file (.gd) 
that extends from the SproutyDialogsEventInterpreter class.
Where you define the process methods to run your custom event nodes.
en:
Path to the custom event interpreter script file (.gd) 
that extends from the SproutyDialogsEventInterpreter class.
Where you define the process methods to run your custom event nodes.
zh_Hans:
自定义事件解释器脚本文件（.gd）的路径，
该脚本必须继承自 SproutyDialogsEventInterpreter 类，
用于定义处理自定义事件节点的方法。

keys: Open URL on meta tag click
en: Open URL on meta tag click
zh_Hans: 点击 meta 标签时打开 URL
按最大字符数分割对话
允许跳过文本显示动画

keys:
Time in seconds that the text takes to reveal each character. 
The higher the number, the longer it will take to reveal the next character.
en:
Time in seconds that the text takes to reveal each character. 
The higher the number, the longer it will take to reveal the next character.
zh_Hans:
文本显示每个字符所需的时间（秒）。
数值越大，显示下一个字符所需的时间越长。

keys:
If enabled, opens a hyperlink in the browser when a URL tag is clicked during a dialog.
By default the URL tags are handled by 'meta_clicked' signal on RichTextLabels.
You can do the same with the 'meta_clicked' signal in a DialogBox to more advanced use cases.
en:
If enabled, opens a hyperlink in the browser when a URL tag is clicked during a dialog.
By default the URL tags are handled by 'meta_clicked' signal on RichTextLabels.
You can do the same with the 'meta_clicked' signal in a DialogBox to more advanced use cases.
zh_Hans:
启用后，在对话中点击网址标签时将在浏览器中打开超链接。
默认情况下，网址标签由 RichTextLabel 的 'meta_clicked' 信号处理。
您也可以通过 DialogBox 的 'meta_clicked' 信号实现相同功能，以满足更高级的使用场景。

keys: Line breaks will be considered paragraphs. Each paragraph is displayed as a new dialog (or block of text in the dialog box). Otherwise, the text is displayed all at once.
en: Line breaks will be considered paragraphs. Each paragraph is displayed as a new dialog (or block of text in the dialog box). Otherwise, the text is displayed all at once.
zh_Hans: 换行符将被视为段落分隔符。每个段落将显示为一段新对话（或对话框中的独立文本块）。否则，所有文本将一次性显示。

keys: The text is divided into paragraphs according to a character limit. Otherwise, it is displayed all at once.
en: The text is divided into paragraphs according to a character limit. Otherwise, it is displayed all at once.
zh_Hans: 文本将根据字符数限制自动分段，否则将一次性全部显示。

keys: Maximum character limit. Only used if the dialogue is split by a character limit.
en: Maximum character limit. Only used if the dialogue is split by a character limit.
zh_Hans: 最大字符数限制。仅在按字符数分割对话时生效。

keys: Allows to skip text reveal and display everything at once.
en: Allows to skip text reveal and display everything at once.
zh_Hans: 允许跳过文字显示动画，直接显示全部内容。

keys:
Time in seconds during which the text cannot be skipped again. 
This is necessary to prevent the entire text from being skipped.
en:
Time in seconds during which the text cannot be skipped again. 
This is necessary to prevent the entire text from being skipped.
zh_Hans:
两次跳过操作之间的最小间隔时间（秒）。
用于防止连续跳过导致整段文本被略过。

keys: Time in seconds during which you must wait for the dialogue to continue after skipping the text reveal.
en: Time in seconds during which you must wait for the dialogue to continue after skipping the text reveal.
zh_Hans: 跳过文字显示动画后，等待对话继续的时间（秒）

keys: [color=tomato]Please select a valid directory for the CSV files.
en: [color=tomato]Please select a valid directory for the CSV files.
zh_Hans: [color=tomato]请选择一个有效的目录来存放 CSV 文件。
使用 CSV 文件翻译角色名称

keys: [color=tomato]Please select a valid CSV file for character name translation [i](It must be inside the CSV file directory).
en: [color=tomato]Please select a valid CSV file for character name translation [i](It must be inside the CSV file directory).
zh_Hans: [color=tomato]请为角色名称翻译选择一个有效的CSV文件来[i]（必须在CSV文件目录内）。

keys:
Enable the use of CSV files for translations.
Otherwise, translations will be saved in the dialogue data file.
en:
Enable the use of CSV files for translations.
Otherwise, translations will be saved in the dialogue data file.
zh_Hans:
启用 CSV 文件进行翻译。
否则，翻译内容将保存在对话数据文件中。

keys:
Path to the directory of the CSV translation files.
This directory must contain all the CSV files used for the dialogs. 
(It is necessary to collect all translations in godot).
en:
Path to the directory of the CSV translation files.
This directory must contain all the CSV files used for the dialogs. 
(It is necessary to collect all translations in godot).
zh_Hans:
CSV 翻译文件所在的目录路径。
该目录必须包含对话所使用的所有CSV文件。
（这是 Godot 中收集所有翻译的必要条件。）

keys:
When a dialog key is not found in the CSV file, the dialog will be loaded from the dialogue data file.
(This only applies when opening a dialog file in the editor, not when running the dialog).
en:
When a dialog key is not found in the CSV file, the dialog will be loaded from the dialogue data file.
(This only applies when opening a dialog file in the editor, not when running the dialog).
zh_Hans:
当 CSV 文件中找不到指定的对话键时，将从对话数据文件中加载该对话。
（此规则仅适用于在编辑器中打开对话文件时，运行时无效。）

keys: Enable translation for the character names.
en: Enable translation for the character names.

keys:
Enable the use of CSV files for character name translations.
Otherwise, translations will be saved in the character data file.
en:
Enable the use of CSV files for character name translations.
Otherwise, translations will be saved in the character data file.
zh_Hans:
启用 CSV 文件进行角色名称翻译。
否则，翻译内容将保存在角色数据文件中。

keys: Path to the CSV file with the character name translations. It must be inside the CSV translations folder.
en: Path to the CSV file with the character name translations. It must be inside the CSV translations folder.
zh_Hans: 包含角色名称翻译的 CSV 文件路径。该文件必须位于 CSV 翻译文件夹内。

keys:
Collect the translations from CSV files into Godot so they can be used. You can find the collected translations 
in Project > Project settings > Localization > Translations.
en:
Collect the translations from CSV files into Godot so they can be used. You can find the collected translations 
in Project > Project settings > Localization > Translations.
zh_Hans: 将CSV文件中的翻译内容收集到 Godot 中以便使用。收集到的翻译可在“项目 > 项目设置 > 本地化 > 翻译”中查看。

keys: Set the locales into which the dialogs will be translated.
en: Set the locales into which the dialogs will be translated.
zh_Hans: 设置对话的目标翻译区域。

keys:
Some locales have been removed, so their respective texts in the CSV translation files will be removed when saving the dialog files.

Do you want to save the changes anyway?
en:
Some locales have been removed, so their respective texts in the CSV translation files will be removed when saving the dialog files.

Do you want to save the changes anyway?
zh_Hans:
部分区域已被移除，保存对话文件时，CSV 翻译文件中对应的文本也将被删除。

是否仍要保存更改？

keys:
If true, the dialog box will close while waiting.
Otherwise, the dialog box will remain visible while waiting.
en:
If true, the dialog box will close while waiting.
Otherwise, the dialog box will remain visible while waiting.
zh_Hans:
如果为真，对话框将在等待期间关闭。
否则，对话框将在等待期间保持可见。
